text_block_list.text:
Once at the venue, Gold City becomes very
focused, with an intensity that I feel hesitant to
intrude on.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm going to try harder than I did in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to muster all the strength I've gained
with your help. So...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Try to get me going... without killing the vibe.
choice_data_list: Go get the recognition you want!
Go get the recognition you want!
